display.purpose: Page titles and primary section headers. Fixed rem, never fluid.

body.purpose: Default UI and prose text; prose capped at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, table headers, badges.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Buttons, inputs, cards at rest (shadow-xs). Barely-there interactive lift.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Genuinely floating layers: dialogs, popovers, dropdowns, tooltips.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, open/close).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Most UI state transitions; users are in flow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-emphasis action; one per view. Slate ink fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #0f172a; color: #f8fafc; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0f172ae6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(2 8 23 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9cc; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(2 8 23 / 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action on a bordered transparent surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #ffffff; color: #020817; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(2 8 23 / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field; hairline border, transparent fill, ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: transparent; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; color: #020817; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #020817; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content container; flat with a hairline border and resting shadow. Never nested.
components.html:
Nitrogen balance
Connected insight from the raw data you entered.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: #ffffff; color: #020817; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card-title { font: 600 1.5rem/1.25 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-body { margin-top: 0.375rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: App-shell navigation item on the second neutral layer; quiet hover, filled active state.
components.html: OverviewAtlas
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; width: 16rem; padding: 0.75rem; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e4e4e7; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; color: #3f3f46; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f4f4f5; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #f4f4f5; color: #18181b; }

narrative.overview: fdm-app is a quiet, expert tool that disappears into the task. Users bring raw farm data they already know and leave with connected agronomic insight. A calm near-monochrome slate surface, a single Inter voice, and consistent shadcn/Radix components keep attention on the data and the decision, never on the chrome. The personality is calm, trustworthy, and modern; density is honest but never cluttered, and color is earned, never sprayed.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochrome slate surface; hue reserved for data and state.
One typeface (Inter) across headings, labels, body, and data.
Flat by default; subtle shadows only as a response to state.
Full light/dark parity via CSS custom properties.
Standard, consistent component vocabulary (shadcn new-york + Radix).

rules.name: The Earned-Color Rule
rules.body: Saturated color appears only where it encodes meaning (chart series, status, current selection), never as decoration.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter carries everything; hierarchy comes from weight and size on a tight ~1.2 ratio, not from a second family.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and bordered at rest; a shadow is a signal (hover, focus, true overlay), never decoration.

dos: Do keep the surface neutral slate and spend saturated color only on data, status, and the current selection.
Do define default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, and error states for every interactive component.
Do keep body and placeholder text at AA contrast (>=4.5:1).
Do use one Inter voice with weight/size for hierarchy and fixed rem sizes for headings.
Do keep layouts working down to a 14-inch laptop and degrade advanced/spatial features gracefully on phones.
Do pair every status/indicator color with a label, icon, or value so meaning survives color blindness and dark mode.
donts: Don't add clutter that buries the insight.
Don't oversell with hype gradients, glow, or unsubstantiated claims; trust comes from transparent, auditable numbers.
Don't make it feel enterprise-corporate or gated to big companies.
Don't ask the user to enter derived values; capture only raw data they know and derive the rest.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or display fonts in UI labels.
Don't introduce a second typeface or reinvent standard affordances; reach for a modal only after inline options are exhausted.
